rules.title: Hardcoded Secret Pattern
rules.description: Detected token-like secret material committed in source files.
rules.recommendation: Remove the value, rotate exposed credentials, and load from environment.

rules.title: Known Vulnerable Dependency
rules.description: Dependency version is flagged by the native advisory dataset.
rules.recommendation: Upgrade to a patched version and regenerate lockfiles.

rules.title: Injection Sink Pattern
rules.description: Potential command or SQL injection sink detected without sanitization.
rules.recommendation: Use parameterized APIs and sanitize untrusted inputs.

rules.title: Missing Authorization Guard
rules.description: Sensitive code path appears to execute without access control checks.
rules.recommendation: Add explicit authorization checks at the system boundary.

rules.title: Insecure Transport Usage
rules.description: Plain HTTP endpoint usage detected for potentially sensitive traffic.
rules.recommendation: Enforce HTTPS and reject insecure URL schemes in production flows.

rules.title: Overly Permissive Security Config
rules.description: Permissive CORS or security headers configuration detected.
rules.recommendation: Restrict origins/headers and apply environment-specific allowlists.

rules.title: DAST Hook Telemetry
rules.description: DAST execution is not part of v1 and is tracked as telemetry only.
rules.recommendation: Review hook status and schedule DAST worker rollout separately.
